schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme "Tiatr Script Writing Competition" by the Tiatr Academy of Goa aims to encourage new generation of Tiatr playwrights to script better quality of Tiatrs and enrich the Konkani language through annual script writing competitions. The scheme provides cash prizes up to ₹15,000/- for winning scripts and opportunities for publication with honorarium payments, along with certificates for recognition of literary excellence in traditional Konkani theatre. The applicant must write original scripts in traditional tiatr format with minimum 6-7 podd'de and at least 4 Cantos, and must submit scripts that have not been published or performed earlier. The scheme is implemented by Tiatr Academy of Goa and applications are accepted through offline submission of typed copies with duly filled application forms.
schemeContent.benefits_md: ##### ***Cash Prizes*** - 1st Prize: ₹15,000/- - 2nd Prize: ₹10,000/- - 3rd Prize: ₹5,000/- ##### ***Additional Benefits*** - **Certificates:** Provided to first three prize winners.- **Publication Opportunity:** Prize winning scripts can be printed in book form at Tiatr Academy of Goa's cost (subject to No Objection Certificate from script writer).- **Honorarium:** ₹5,000/- one-time payment for published scripts (in addition to prize money).- **Complimentary Copies:** 100 copies of the published book provided to script writer. ##### ***Conditions*** - Scripts must comply with content guidelines - no adverse remarks against any Governments/Individuals/Institutions or anything against caste, creed and religion - For publication benefits, script writers must provide No Objection Certificate to Tiatr Academy of Goa.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to encourage new generation playwrights to create quality Tiatr scripts and enrich Konkani language. It provides cash prizes and publication opportunities for original traditional format scripts.

children.text: The scheme "Tiatr Script Writing Competition" by the Tiatr Academy of Goa aims to encourage new generation of Tiatr playwrights to script better quality of Tiatrs and enrich the Konkani language through annual script writing competitions. The scheme provides cash prizes up to ₹15,000/- for winning scripts and opportunities for publication with honorarium payments, along with certificates for recognition of literary excellence in traditional Konkani theatre. The applicant must write original scripts in traditional tiatr format with minimum 6-7 podd'de and at least 4 Cantos, and must submit scripts that have not been published or performed earlier. The scheme is implemented by Tiatr Academy of Goa and applications are accepted through offline submission of typed copies with duly filled application forms.
Cash Prizes
3rd Prize: ₹5,000/-
Additional Benefits
Certificates:
Provided to first three prize winners.
Publication Opportunity:
Prize winning scripts can be printed in book form at Tiatr Academy of Goa's cost (subject to No Objection Certificate from script writer).
Honorarium:
₹5,000/- one-time payment for published scripts (in addition to prize money).
Complimentary Copies:
100 copies of the published book provided to script writer.
Conditions
Scripts must comply with content guidelines - no adverse remarks against any Governments/Individuals/Institutions or anything against caste, creed and religion
For publication benefits, script writers must provide No Objection Certificate to Tiatr Academy of Goa.
Step 1:
The interested applicant should take a printout of the
prescribed format
of the application form.
Step 2:
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields. Attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required). Sign the application form and mention the date.
Step 3:
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to -
Tiatr Academy of Goa, AS-1 / AS-4, Block A, 2nd Floor, Campal Trade Centre, Opposite Kala Academy, Campal, Panaji, Goa, India – 403001
*Applicants are advised to save a copy of the submitted application form and any acknowledgment
Post-Application Processes
Step 1:
Evaluation Process

The submitted scripts will be evaluated by a panel of judges appointed by Tiatr Academy of Goa, whose decision will be final and binding. The judging process will assess scripts based on quality, format compliance, and adherence to specified themes.
Step 2:
Result Declaration and Prize Distribution

Winners will be announced after the judging process is completed, and the first three best scripts will receive cash prizes and certificates as specified. Prize winners will be contacted for any additional procedures related to publication opportunities.

applicationProcess.process_md: **Step 1:** The interested applicant should take a printout of the [prescribed format](https://www.goa.gov.in/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/Citizen-Charter-TAG.pdf) of the application form. **Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields. Attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required). Sign the application form and mention the date. **Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to - ***Tiatr Academy of Goa, AS-1 / AS-4, Block A, 2nd Floor, Campal Trade Centre, Opposite Kala Academy, Campal, Panaji, Goa, India – 403001*** _*Applicants are advised to save a copy of the submitted application form and any acknowledgment_ ##### ***Post-Application Processes*** **Step 1:****** ***Evaluation Process*** The submitted scripts will be evaluated by a panel of judges appointed by Tiatr Academy of Goa, whose decision will be final and binding. The judging process will assess scripts based on quality, format compliance, and adherence to specified themes. **Step 2:** **Result Declaration and Prize Distribution** Winners will be announced after the judging process is completed, and the first three best scripts will receive cash prizes and certificates as specified. Prize winners will be contacted for any additional procedures related to publication opportunities.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: ##### ***Basic Requirements*** - The applicant must write scripts on themes as specified by Tiatr Academy of Goa. - The applicant must ensure the script has not been published or performed earlier. - The applicant must write original scripts only. ##### ***Script Format Requirements*** - The applicant must write scripts in traditional tiatr format. - The applicant must include minimum 6 to 7 podd'de in the script. - The applicant must include at least 4 Cantos in the script. - The applicant must write scripts in Konkani language using Roman script. - The applicant must ensure comedy is inter-related to the main plot (however, comedy may be absent in religious tiatr). ##### ***Content Guidelines*** - The applicant must ensure scripts do not contain adverse remarks against any Governments/Individuals/Institutions. - The applicant must ensure scripts do not contain content against caste, creed and religion that may hurt sentiments.

children.text: Basic Requirements
The applicant must write scripts on themes as specified by Tiatr Academy of Goa.
The applicant must ensure the script has not been published or performed earlier.
The applicant must write original scripts only.
Script Format Requirements
The applicant must write scripts in traditional tiatr format.
The applicant must include minimum 6 to 7 podd'de in the script.
The applicant must include at least 4 Cantos in the script.
The applicant must write scripts in Konkani language using Roman script.
The applicant must ensure comedy is inter-related to the main plot (however, comedy may be absent in religious tiatr).
Content Guidelines
The applicant must ensure scripts do not contain adverse remarks against any Governments/Individuals/Institutions.
The applicant must ensure scripts do not contain content against caste, creed and religion that may hurt sentiments.
